Security note and recommendation
- The first email (support@techservices.com) looks like the official reset; it is unread in your inbox. The second email is from a third‑party AOL address and contains another domain and odd wording — it may be a phishing attempt. 
- I recommend using the official support@techservices.com link if you requested the reset, or going directly to the TechServices website (not clicking links in emails) and initiating the reset from there. If you did not request a reset, do not click any links and consider reporting the suspicious message and/or contacting IT.

Would you like me to:
- Open/forward either email to someone (IT/security)?
- Mark the unread reset email as read?
- Create a calendar reminder about one of the events?
